name: NIST AI RMF: MANAGE — Risk Treated
description: Each identified risk is treated — mitigated, transferred, avoided, or formally accepted.
rationale: NIST AI RMF MANAGE 1/2: strategies to maximize benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, and risks are treated and documented.

examples.fails: the required risk-management step is absent

source: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0), NIST AI 100-1, 26 Jan 2023 — voluntary framework organised around GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
